property.name: message
property.value: Incorrect matcher import used: The "org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat" import should be used for tests

property.name: message
property.value: Don't use JetBrains NotNull use javax.annotation.Notnull.

property.name: message
property.value: Don't use JetBrains Nullable use javax.annotation.Nullable.

property.name: message
property.value: Don't use JetBrains annotations use javax.annotation.

property.name: message
property.value: Don't use System.out/err, use SLF4J instead.

property.name: message
property.value: Usage of Pattern.compile(...) is only allowed in SafePattern.

property.name: message
property.value: Usage of Pattern.matches(...) is only allowed in SafePattern.

property.name: message
property.value: Usage of SafePattern.compileKnownSafePattern(...) is not allowed.

property.name: message
property.value: Usage of SafePattern.matchesKnownSafePattern(...) is not allowed.

property.name: message
property.value: Usage of TransformerFactory.newInstance() is only allowed in XMLUtil.newXXEProtectedTransformerFactory().

property.name: message
property.value: Usage of DocumentBuilderFactory.newInstance() is only allowed in XMLUtil.newXXEProtectedDocumentBuilderFactory(). If the location of this call in XMLUtil has changed, please modify the expected line number in org.hl7.fhir.utilities/checkstyle_suppressions.xml

property.name: message
property.value: Usage of SAXParserFactory.newInstance() is only allowed in XMLUtil.newXXEProtectedSaxParserFactory(). If the location of this call in XMLUtil has changed, please modify the expected line number in org.hl7.fhir.utilities/checkstyle_suppressions.xml

property.name: message
property.value: Usage of SAXParserFactory.getXMLReader() is only allowed in XMLUtil.getXXEProtectedXMLReader(...). If the location of this call in XMLUtil has changed, please modify the expected line number in org.hl7.fhir.utilities/checkstyle_suppressions.xml
